query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, u.clinicaId, u.passwordHash, c.codigo, c.nome FROM users u LEFT JOIN clinicas c ON u.clinicaId = c.id WHERE u.email = 'dreatnu@yahoo.com'
